title: achyranthes bidentata
intro: Achyranthes bidentata, also known as two-toothed achyranthes or huai mi bai zi in traditional Chinese medicine, is a plant species belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Achyranthes bidentata include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Achyranthes bidentata is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make granules, capsules, or tablets.
